hero.title: 8-Month Intensive Training Program
hero.subtitle: Comprehensive missionary training from a Korean church perspective

overview.title: Program Overview
overview.description: Our program provides a unique opportunity to experience missionary training through the lens of Korea's dynamic church movement. You'll gain practical skills, theological depth, and cross-cultural competency while being immersed in one of the world's most vibrant Christian communities.

subjects.title: Korean Church History & Theology
subjects.description: Explore the unique development and theology of the Korean church, from persecution to explosive growth.

subjects.title: Cross-Cultural Communication
subjects.description: Learn effective communication strategies across cultural boundaries and develop cultural intelligence.

subjects.title: Bible Study Methods
subjects.description: Master various approaches to Scripture study including Korean inductive methods and devotional practices.

subjects.title: Worship & Prayer
subjects.description: Experience Korean worship styles and prayer traditions, including early morning prayer (Saemoonsuk).

subjects.title: Korean Language Basics
subjects.description: Gain functional Korean language skills for daily life and ministry contexts.

subjects.title: Leadership Development
subjects.description: Develop leadership skills through hands-on ministry and mentorship relationships.
